name: @archi/desktop
description: Local-first Kindle to Notion sync desktop app
author: Archi

scripts.build: pnpm run build:deps && vite build && tsc -p tsconfig.main.json && tsc -p tsconfig.preload.json
scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n RENDERER,MAIN,PRELOAD,ELECTRON -c green,cyan,magenta,yellow "pnpm dev:renderer" "pnpm dev:main" "pnpm dev:preload" "pnpm dev:electron"
scripts.dev:electron: tsc -p tsconfig.main.json && tsc -p tsconfig.preload.json && wait-on tcp:${VITE_PORT:-5173} && cross-env VITE_DEV_SERVER_URL=http://localhost:${VITE_PORT:-5173} electron dist/main/index.js
scripts.package: pnpm build && electron-builder --config electron-builder.yml --mac dmg --publish never && node ./scripts/verify-packaged-runtime.mjs && node ./scripts/verify-packaged-boot.mjs && node ./scripts/verify-signing.mjs
scripts.package:universal: pnpm build && electron-builder --config electron-builder.yml --mac dmg --universal --publish never && node ./scripts/verify-packaged-runtime.mjs && node ./scripts/verify-packaged-boot.mjs && node ./scripts/verify-signing.mjs
scripts.release: pnpm build && electron-builder --config electron-builder.yml --mac dmg --publish always && node ./scripts/verify-packaged-runtime.mjs && node ./scripts/verify-packaged-boot.mjs && node ./scripts/verify-signing.mjs
scripts.typecheck: tsc -p tsconfig.main.json --noEmit && tsc -p tsconfig.preload.json --noEmit && tsc -p tsconfig.renderer.json --noEmit
